title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the Indian Statistical Institute Act, 1959. (2) It shall come into force on such date1 as the Central Government may, by notification in the Official Gazette, appoint.
footnote: 1. 1st April, 1960, vide notification No. S.O. 584(E), dated 2nd March, 1960, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec 3(ii).
